Super Lotto 6/49 had the winning combination 24-15-06-44-40-23 for a jackpot of ₱25 million. There was no jackpot winner as well. articles.title: Late-Night Hosts Drop Surprise as Parting Gift for Stephen Colbert
articles.description: CBS/Instagram Stephen Colbert’s late-night peers joined his show on Monday to announce a surprise gift to both Colbert and his fans. Jimmy Kimmel, Seth Meyers, John Oliver and Jimmy Fallon were all interviewed by Colbert at the same time. They came to show their support for The Late Show with Stephen Colbert as it heads towards its final episode on May 21. Colbert announced in July last year that CBS had canceled his show. CBS’s decision was immediately criticized by other late-night hosts, with Jimmy Kimmel telling the network, “f--- you and all your Sheldons” in a fiery Instagram post. Read more at The Daily Beast.
